channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Here's What We Know About Trump Declaring an Emergency in D.C. Over Potomac Sewage Spill
WATCH: Top 5 most memorable moments in American State of the Union history
item.description: Trump's upcoming State of the Union address could spark viral moments like Reagan's guest acknowledgment, Pelosi tearing up Trump's speech, and Biden'...

item.title: POTUS and FLOTUS in Attendance at White House Governors Dinner — but Note Who Didn't Show Up
DHS suspends TSA PreCheck, Global Entry as partial government shutdown continues
item.description: TSA PreCheck and Global Entry services suspended starting Sunday due to government shutdown affecting Department of Homeland Security operations.

item.title: Grenell calls ice rink vandal a 'terrorist' as federal authorities hunt suspect in toxic attack
item.description: Trump-Kennedy Center vandalism suspect accused of pouring toxic substance on outdoor ice rink as federal authorities investigate what officials descri...

item.title: Report: NY's Most Lenient Immigration Judge Gets Culled, and DOJ's Reaction Is Chef's Kiss
Bianco says ‘Democrat policy is indefensible’ as GOP candidates top California governor polling
item.description: Sheriff Chad Bianco responds after polling cited by the New York Post shows two Republicans leading California’s crowded governor race.

item.title: Newsom weighs in on social media age restrictions, citing experience as a parent: ‘We need help’
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom backs social media age limits, supporting legislation to restrict platform access for teens in bipartisan state bill.

item.title: Foul-Mouthed CA Gubernatorial Candidate Shouts Anti-Trump Obscenities in Weird Bid to Attract Voters
'Jim Snow 2.0': Mamdani Requires Multiple Forms of ID If You Want to Help Clear NYC Streets
